title: Herbal Malaysian Corn Flour Pilaf
description: A herbal and tender post-workout dish featuring corn flour with low-sodium content for a balanced meal.
instructions: In a large pan, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add ginger paste and garlic paste to the pan and stir for about 30 seconds.
Gradually add corn flour while continuously stirring to avoid lumps. Cook for another minute until thickened.
Pour in vegetable broth gradually, ensuring it mixes well with the corn flour mixture.
Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until sauce thickens further.
Taste test and adjust seasoning with salt if needed. Stir in fresh herbs like coriander leaves to garnish.
Serve hot as part of your lunch meal.
